title: [3.12] gh-126876: Fix socket internal_select() for large timeout (GH-126968)
author: miss-islington
body:
If the timeout is larger than INT_MAX, replace it with INT_MAX, in
the poll() code path.

Add an unit test.
(cherry picked from commit b3687ad454c4ac54c8599a10f3ace8a13ca48915)

Co-authored-by: Victor Stinner <vstinner@python.org>

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-126876 -->
* Issue: gh-126876
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: Yhg1s
comments.body: @vstinner this backport is broken because of a missing import of _testcapi, which exposes a different problem in the upstream change (where _testcapi is imported at the top level when it's available): the tests aren't skipped if _testcapi is None. Would you mind fixing that in main?

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> @vstinner this backport is broken because of a missing import of _testcapi, which exposes a different problem in the upstream change (where _testcapi is imported at the top level when it's available): the tests aren't skipped if _testcapi is None. Would you mind fixing that in main?

Alright, I wrote https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/127517 to fix the test in main.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: I included my test_socket fix https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/127517 in this backport.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> I included my test_socket fix https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/127517 in this backport.

Oh, I didn't notice that test_socket is very different in 3.12, it doesn't import `_testcapi` at the module level. I wrote the test differently to make it specific to CPython.
